name: microdot
notes: Pinned to the official upstream package layout so websocket support comes from microdot.websocket.

name: drivetrain-pid-fork
local_patches: adds independent integral_limits separate from output_limits
documents and preserves explicit drivetrain timing semantics
converts dt to seconds before applying Ki and Kd math
clamps set_auto_mode integral state against integral_limits
notes: Project-owned drivetrain PID code derived from the MicroPython fork. Treat updates as control-behavior changes that require regression and bench validation.
